creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 218690
Deprecate port

I had a look and this only builds in 12.1 right now because by some reason uses an "old" compiler (clang 8.0.1). However, there are tons of casting errors[1]. Since this is unmaintained, I would like to mark this port for removal.

Cheers.

[1] https://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/getmsg.cgi?fetch=63190579+0+current/freebsd-pkg-fallout
